subject.appearance: 23-year-old French female, casual gaming outfit, slight frustration on face, holding a smartphone vertically with both hands

movement_timeline.action: Subject bites her lower lip in intense concentration while tapping the screen rhythmically
Subject gasps slightly and her eyes widen in surprise at an unexpected in-game event, while fingers maintain grip on the phone

environment.background_dynamics: soft out-of-focus neon lights pulsing gently in the background

lighting.changes_over_time: purple and blue neon lights slowly sweep across the subject's face mimicking screen flashes

temporal_consistency: Subject facial features must remain consistent without melting
Hands tracking and finger positions must strictly match natural physics
Smartphone geometry must stay perfectly rectangular

forbidden_elements: morphing, melting geometry, extra limbs appearing, impossible physics, jittery background, plastic skin, beautification filters, anime style, CGI rendering, inconsistent lighting between frames
